metadata.description: High availability policy and topology overlay; never a standalone kit.

Shared StackKits Architecture v2 contract for host-bootstrap.

Shared StackKits Architecture v2 contract for observability-evidence.
Shared StackKits Architecture v2 contract for lifecycle-update.
Home-site Architecture v2 contract for site-local.
Home-site Architecture v2 contract for lan-discovery.
Home-site Architecture v2 contract for local-ingress.
Home-site Architecture v2 contract for lan-access-policy.
Home-site Architecture v2 contract for device-enrollment-home.
Home-site Architecture v2 contract for local-control-authority.
Home-site Architecture v2 contract for offline-autonomy.
Home-site Architecture v2 contract for local-backup-target.
Home-site Architecture v2 contract for lan-dns.
Home-site Architecture v2 contract for private-remote-access.
Home-site Architecture v2 contract for public-publish-egress.
Home-site Architecture v2 contract for encrypted-offsite-backup.
Basement-owned Compose rollout contract; it is not inferred from a home site or legacy context.
Cloud-site Architecture v2 contract for site-cloud.
Cloud-site Architecture v2 contract for host-local-internet-firewall.
Cloud-site Architecture v2 contract for public-edge.
Cloud-site Architecture v2 contract for public-dns.
Cloud-site Architecture v2 contract for internet-host-hardening.
Cloud-site Architecture v2 contract for remote-owner-bootstrap.
Cloud-site Architecture v2 contract for offsite-object-backup.
Cloud-site Architecture v2 contract for cloud-control-authority.
Cloud-site Architecture v2 contract for private-admin-mesh.
Cloud-site Architecture v2 contract for failure-domain-placement.
Home-private certificate policy resolved through a dedicated internal CA adapter.
Public WebPKI certificate policy resolved through a dedicated ACME edge adapter.
High-availability add-on contract for availability-ha.
Known unsafe or profile-incompatible contract for cloud-enrollment-authority.
Known unsafe or profile-incompatible contract for broad-lan-route-advertisement.
Deterministic target-neutral OS-hardening policy generated once for every managed StackKit node; access and network controls remain delegated.
Node-local, provider-free Core host preparation owner; it creates only declared StackKit storage roots and observes the required pre-existing runtime.

Node-local Home backup-target verifier; it observes the CUE-declared backup root on Home control-plane nodes after Core host bootstrap and owns no provider, network, discovery, or backup-job lifecycle.
Provider-neutral Home private-access binding; transport, endpoints, credentials, provider lifecycle, discovery, and general LAN reachability remain external.
Outbound-only Home publication boundary; public DNS, TLS issuance, credentials, inbound tunnels, and provider lifecycle remain external.
Provider-neutral encrypted Home offsite-backup binding; repositories, endpoints, credentials, retention execution, restore execution, and provider lifecycle remain external.
Contract-only internal CA and renewal owner; no certificate material or termination runtime is generated yet.
Generation-only Home enrollment and credential-authority policy; credential material, endpoints, and runtime enforcement are excluded.
Generation-only Basement identity verifier and trust policy; runtime enforcement and credential material are excluded.
Generation-only Home-site offline-autonomy policy; runtime and air-gapped installation enforcement remain separate claims.
Generation-only Home local-ingress and LAN access policy; discovery and runtime enforcement remain separate claims.
Generation-only explicit Home LAN discovery policy; empty intent emits no advertisements and runtime publication remains separately verified.
Cloud-only node-local firewall and Internet-host hardening boundary; it owns no public edge, DNS, backup, mesh, or server-provider lifecycle.
Cloud-only public edge boundary; DNS provider mutation, TLS issuance, host hardening, backup, mesh, and server lifecycle remain separate.
Provider-neutral Cloud offsite-backup target binding; object-storage provider lifecycle, buckets, endpoints, credentials, retention execution, and backup jobs remain external.
Optional provider-neutral private admin-mesh policy handoff; transport, endpoints, credentials, identity issuance, provider lifecycle, federation, and LAN reachability remain separate.
Contract-only public ACME issuer and edge-termination owner; no certificate material or runtime adapter is generated yet.
Generation-only Cloud identity trust policy with external device authority and Cloud-local verification; no device issuance or enrollment is owned.
Residual Basement-only Compose rollout owner; concrete foundation helpers lower independently beneath it.
Basement node-local Docker API isolation proxy backed by one explicitly approved daemon socket.
Immich photo service contract bound to the control-authority site and its personal-data primary.

command: until pg_isready -h immich-postgres -U immich -d postgres; do sleep 1; done; psql -h immich-postgres -U immich -d postgres -tAc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'immich'" | grep -q 1 || createdb -h immich-postgres -U immich immich
